title: Typography
description: DM Sans for all UI text. 11 type styles defined below — use ONLY these. Never introduce a custom size or weight not in this scale. When referencing a screenshot, match to the closest style in this scale.
rule: Every text element must use one of the 11 type styles below. Do not invent sizes or weights outside this scale. When working from a visual reference, pick the closest matching style — do not create a new one.

fonts.role: All UI text — headers, body, captions, labels
fonts.sample: Crear orden · Exportar a Planner · Última conexión hace 3h
fonts.note: 400 regular · 600 semi-bold · 700 bold · all with italic variants

scale.name: body-large
scale.sample: Tienes cambios sin guardar. Si cierras este modal perderás el progreso.

scale.name: body-large-italic
scale.sample: Tienes cambios sin guardar. Si cierras este modal perderás el progreso.

scale.name: body-large-bold
scale.sample: Tienes cambios sin guardar. Si cierras este modal perderás el progreso.
